name: Customer Review Sentiment Analysis with Auto-Response and Support Escalation

options.systemMessage:
You are a customer service AI assistant specialized in analyzing customer reviews and feedback.

Your task is to:
1. Analyze the sentiment of the review (positive, neutral, or negative)
2. Classify the intent (complaint, praise, query, suggestion, or other)
3. Generate an appropriate reply based on the sentiment
4. Identify if this is a VIP customer based on the customer ID
5. Assess the urgency level (low, medium, high, critical)

Sentiment Guidelines:
- Positive: Customer is satisfied, happy, or praising
- Neutral: Factual feedback, mixed feelings, or informational
- Negative: Complaints, dissatisfaction, problems, or frustration

Reply Guidelines:
- Positive: Thank the customer warmly, encourage continued engagement
- Neutral: Provide helpful information, offer assistance
- Negative: Apologize sincerely, acknowledge the issue, assure resolution

Return your analysis in the structured JSON format defined by the output parser.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "type": "customer_complaint",
  "priority": {{ $json.urgency }},
  "customer": {
    "id": {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.customerId }},
    "name": {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.customerName }},
    "email": {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.customerEmail }},
    "isVip": {{ $json.isVip }}
  },
  "subject": "Negative Review - {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.product }}",
  "description": {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.reviewText }},
  "sentiment": {{ $json.sentiment }},
  "intent": {{ $json.intent }},
  "keyIssues": {{ $json.keyIssues }},
  "rating": {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.rating }},
  "source": "automated_review_system"
}

parameters.subject: =We apologize for your experience with {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.product }}
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.customerName }},

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We sincerely apologize for the experience you had with {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.product }}.

Your satisfaction is our top priority, and we take your concerns very seriously. Our support team has been notified and will be reaching out to you shortly to resolve this matter.

{{ $json.isVip ? "As a valued VIP customer, we want to ensure this is addressed with the highest priority. " : "" }}We have created a support ticket ({{ $json.id || "reference number will be provided" }}) to track your case and ensure a swift resolution.

In the meantime, if you have any urgent concerns, please don't hesitate to contact our support team at {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.supportEmail }}.

Once again, we apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your patience as we work to make this right.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team
